Process

How TradeMatch works

From posting your job to paying your tradesperson — handled securely in one place.

1
Post your job
Describe your project in 60 seconds. Add photos for faster, better-matched quotes.
2
Receive quotes
Up to 5 verified, insured tradespeople send competitive quotes within 48 hours.
3
Compare & choose
Review profiles, ratings, and past work. Chat directly before committing.
4
Pay with confidence
Funds held in escrow. Released only when you're fully satisfied.
